record.field:
Terms & Conditions: 

1. We being a Merchant Exporter wants to procure goods for supply of goods for export at concessional rate of IGST or CGST/SGST. As per notification number 41/2017 Dated 23.10.2017. 
2. Marking will be provided by us (Buyer). 
3. You are liable for any end buyer claim due to quality discrepancies for purchase deliveries without our QC report.
4. Buyer has option to accept or reject cargo if delivered after deadline.
5. Buyer has option to reject cargo if government of India imposes any ban on imports / exports. 
6. No cross contracts between suppliers are allowed unless approved by us.
7. Any discrepancies in this purchase order must be notified within same day of this order.
8. All transportation Charges on account of Seller i.e. Delivery at Port (CFS/Warehouse). 
9. Any duty levied by the Central/State Government, will be on account of Seller. 
10. Weight Receipt (at Port/CFS/Warehouse) will be considered for the Payment. 
11. The buyer will pay after receipt of the cargo at Warehouse / Port. 
12. Any dispute or difference arise that should be resolved/settled amicably through arbitration at Ahmedabad. 
13. By signing below or sending cargo to us, you are agree to the above terms & conditions of delivery.

Terms & Conditions: 

1. We being a Merchant Exporter wants to procure goods for supply of goods for export at concessional rate of IGST or CGST/SGST. As per notification number 41/2017 Dated 23.10.2017. 
2. Marking will be provided by us (Buyer). 
3. You are liable for any end buyer claim due to quality discrepancies for purchase deliveries without our QC report.
4. Buyer has option to accept or reject cargo if delivered after deadline.
5. Buyer has option to reject cargo if government of India imposes any ban on imports / exports. 
6. No cross contracts between suppliers are allowed unless approved by us.
7. Any discrepancies in this purchase order must be notified within same day of this order.
8. All transportation Charges on account of Seller i.e. Delivery at Port (CFS/Warehouse). 
9. Any duty levied by the Central/State Government, will be on account of Seller. 
10. Weight Receipt (at Port/CFS/Warehouse) will be considered for the Payment. 
11. The buyer will pay after receipt of the cargo at Warehouse / Port. 
12. Any dispute or difference arise that should be resolved/settled amicably through arbitration at Ahmedabad. 
13. By signing below or sending cargo to us, you are agree to the above terms & conditions of delivery.

Terms & Conditions: 

1. We being a Merchant Exporter wants to procure goods for supply of goods for export at concessional rate of IGST or CGST/SGST. As per notification number 41/2017 Dated 23.10.2017. 
2. Marking will be provided by us (Buyer). 
3. You are liable for any end buyer claim due to quality discrepancies for purchase deliveries without our QC report.
4. Buyer has option to accept or reject cargo if delivered after deadline.
5. Buyer has option to reject cargo if government of India imposes any ban on imports / exports. 
6. No cross contracts between suppliers are allowed unless approved by us.
7. Any discrepancies in this purchase order must be notified within same day of this order.
8. All transportation Charges on account of Seller i.e. Delivery at Port (CFS/Warehouse). 
9. Any duty levied by the Central/State Government, will be on account of Seller. 
10. Weight Receipt (at Port/CFS/Warehouse) will be considered for the Payment. 
11. The buyer will pay after receipt of the cargo at Warehouse / Port. 
12. Any dispute or difference arise that should be resolved/settled amicably through arbitration at Ahmedabad. 
13. By signing below or sending cargo to us, you are agree to the above terms & conditions of delivery.

Terms & Conditions: 

1. We being a Merchant Exporter wants to procure goods for supply of goods for export at concessional rate of IGST or CGST/SGST. As per notification number 41/2017 Dated 23.10.2017. 
2. Marking will be provided by us (Buyer). 
3. You are liable for any end buyer claim due to quality discrepancies for purchase deliveries without our QC report.
4. Buyer has option to accept or reject cargo if delivered after deadline.
5. Buyer has option to reject cargo if government of India imposes any ban on imports / exports. 
6. No cross contracts between suppliers are allowed unless approved by us.
7. Any discrepancies in this purchase order must be notified within same day of this order.
8. All transportation Charges on account of Seller i.e. Delivery at Port (CFS/Warehouse). 
9. Any duty levied by the Central/State Government, will be on account of Seller. 
10. Weight Receipt (at Port/CFS/Warehouse) will be considered for the Payment. 
11. The buyer will pay after receipt of the cargo at Warehouse / Port. 
12. Any dispute or difference arise that should be resolved/settled amicably through arbitration at Ahmedabad. 
13. By signing below or sending cargo to us, you are agree to the above terms & conditions of delivery.

Terms & Conditions: 

1. We being a Merchant Exporter wants to procure goods for supply of goods for export at concessional rate of IGST or CGST/SGST. As per notification number 41/2017 Dated 23.10.2017. 
2. Marking will be provided by us (Buyer). 
3. You are liable for any end buyer claim due to quality discrepancies for purchase deliveries without our QC report.
4. Buyer has option to accept or reject cargo if delivered after deadline.
5. Buyer has option to reject cargo if government of India imposes any ban on imports / exports. 
6. No cross contracts between suppliers are allowed unless approved by us.
7. Any discrepancies in this purchase order must be notified within same day of this order.
8. All transportation Charges on account of Seller i.e. Delivery at Port (CFS/Warehouse). 
9. Any duty levied by the Central/State Government, will be on account of Seller. 
10. Weight Receipt (at Port/CFS/Warehouse) will be considered for the Payment. 
11. The buyer will pay after receipt of the cargo at Warehouse / Port. 
12. Any dispute or difference arise that should be resolved/settled amicably through arbitration at Ahmedabad. 
13. By signing below or sending cargo to us, you are agree to the above terms & conditions of delivery.
